hooks.command: [ ! -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp-server/node_modules" ] && (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp-server" && npm install --silent >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '[treko] installed MCP SDK dependencies'); if ! curl -sf http://localhost:3456/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then if command -v treko >/dev/null 2>&1; then mkdir -p /tmp/treko-plugin && nohup treko start >/tmp/treko-plugin/server.log 2>&1 & disown; echo '[treko] starting server in background (logs: /tmp/treko-plugin/server.log)'; else echo '[treko] CLI not found. Install: bun install -g treko'; fi; fi
